meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: A Freelancer’s Guide to Solving Errors
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to debug faster, impress clients, and ship professional software with ease.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracing logs. Use AI-native tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to automate root-cause analysis. By feeding the stack trace and relevant file context into these LLM-integrated agents, you can generate precise patches, explain complex logic, and maintain high-velocity delivery without the typical developer burnout.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client is expecting a demo in two hours, but your terminal is bleeding red lines of cryptic error messages. You’ve been staring at the same function for forty minutes, chasing a ghost in the machine that refuses to reveal itself. This is the silent killer of freelance careers—the gap between building and shipping.

But the era of manual debugging is over. By integrating AI agents directly into your development workflow, you transform from a frustrated coder into an orchestrator of automated logic. It is time to stop guessing and start resolving.

steps.title: Contextualize the Environment
steps.description: Before debugging, you must provide the AI with the right 'world view' of your code so it understands dependencies and state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following file and identify potential memory leaks or null reference exceptions: [Insert File Content].

steps.title: Inject the Stack Trace
steps.description: Feed the raw error log into the agent to pinpoint the exact line causing the failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: I am receiving this error: [Insert Error Log]. Trace this back to the likely logical failure in the codebase provided.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Explain why this stack trace is occurring given the current logic in the codebase.'

steps.title: Simulate and Hypothesize
steps.description: Ask the AI to simulate the execution flow to identify where the state deviates from expectations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a dry-run trace of the function 'processPayment'. Where does the state variable 'totalAmount' become undefined?

steps.title: Generate the Surgical Fix
steps.description: Request a specific, minimally invasive code patch that solves the bug without introducing regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a patch for the identified bug. Ensure the fix follows DRY principles and maintains existing type safety.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Refactor the handleAuth function to include null checks for the user session object.'

steps.title: Automated Regression Verification
steps.description: Use the AI to verify the fix by running existing test suites and checking for new edge cases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Verify this fix. Generate three edge-case unit tests to ensure this bug does not return.

pro_tips: Always use the 'Explain' function before the 'Fix' function to ensure the AI understands your business logic, not just the syntax.
If the AI struggles, provide the 'package.json' or 'go.mod' file to help it understand your specific library versions.
Use Claude Code's 'review' command on your own code before pushing to identify potential bugs before they even surface in production.
Create a custom 'System Prompt' in Antigravity that defines your preferred coding style (e.g., 'Always use functional programming patterns').
When debugging async code, explicitly tell the AI to 'trace the promise chain' to prevent it from ignoring nested asynchronous failures.
content.next_steps: Once you have resolved the immediate bug, integrate Claude Code into your CI/CD pipeline to automatically lint and test every pull request before your client sees it.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical edge to turn hours of debugging into minutes of high-impact development. Stop letting bugs dictate your freelance schedule and start owning the delivery process. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
